headline: 'Match Group Settles U.S. FTC Lawsuit Claiming It Allowed Third Party To Access Personal Data Of Millions Of OkCupid Users; Settlement Includes Prohibition Against Misrepresenting Privacy Of User Data' - Reuters
summary: Match Group MTCH.O settled a U.S. Federal Trade Commission lawsuit accusing it of giving an outside company access to personal data of millions of OkCupid users including photos, demographic information and location

headline: Match Group Is Significantly Undervalued For A Stable, High-Margin Business
summary: Match Group is a mature, high-margin online dating leader trading at a depressed 11x forward P/E, despite stable revenue and profitability. See why MTCH stock is a Buy.
